top_signals.title: What is Pickaxe Mountain, the Iranian nuclear facility Trump is threatening to strike?
top_signals.summary: "We'll be hitting that area pretty soon, and very heavily," President Donald Trump said about Iran's underground nuclear facility in Pickaxe Mountain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hacker group RansomHouse claims responsibility for cyberattack on Nichirei
top_signals.summary: RansomHouse has previously claimed responsibility for attacks on several Japanese businesses, including a ransomware attack in October on office-supplies retailer Askul.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Samsung details features of its smart glasses as it enters market dominated by Meta
top_signals.summary: The Samsung smart glasses are the tech giant's first foray into the product category which is currently dominated by Meta.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Agencies issue joint statement on handling of highly sensitive information during bank examinations
top_signals.summary: Agencies issue joint statement on handling of highly sensitive information during bank examinations

top_signals.title: Moody’s Lifts Argentina Debt Rating in Fresh Boost to Milei
top_signals.summary: Argentina’s dollar bonds rose after Moody’s Ratings lifted the country’s credit score, giving the nation its third sovereign upgrade in less than three months in a fresh boost to President Javier Milei.

top_signals.title: Samsung ups prices as it launches new foldable smartphones ahead of expected Apple debut
top_signals.summary: Samsung launched the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Galaxy Z Fold8 and Galaxy Z Flip8.

top_signals.title: Baltic Dry Index climbs to 2715 up 45 points
top_signals.summary: Today, Wednesday, July 22 2026, the Baltic Dry Index climbed 45 points, reaching 2715 points. Baltic Dry Index is compiled by the London-based Baltic Exchange and covers prices for transported cargo such as coal, grain and iron ore. The index is based on a daily survey of agents all over the world. Baltic Dry hit ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: DNI nominee Clayton wins Senate panel’s approval
top_signals.summary: By a party-line vote, the Senate Intelligence Committee sent the nomination of Jay Clayton to lead ODNI to the Senate floor.
